text.content:
## 🛠️ Model Armor Resources
---
*   🛡️ **[Model Armor Templates](https://console.cloud.google.com/security/modelarmor/templates)**
*   📝 **[Model Armor Raw Logs](https://console.cloud.google.com/logs/query;query=jsonPayload.%40type%3D%22type.googleapis.com%2Fgoogle.cloud.modelarmor.logging.v1.SanitizeOperationLogEntry%22)**
*   🔍 **[SDP Inspection Templates](https://console.cloud.google.com/security/sensitive-data-protection/landing/configuration/templates/inspect)**
*   🎭 **[SDP De-identification Templates](https://console.cloud.google.com/security/sensitive-data-protection/landing/configuration/templates/deidentify)**
---

opsAnalyticsQuery.sql:
SELECT
  f.filter_type AS `Filter Type`,
  f.confidence_level AS `Confidence Level`,
  COUNT(*) AS `Matched Count`
FROM
  -- 👈 [Please replace with your Project ID] Ensure the path is correct
  `YOUR_GCP_PROJECT_ID.global._Default._AllLogs` AS log,
  
  -- 💡 Core Magic: Pack the status and confidence of all security items into an array within a single log entry and unnest it
  UNNEST([
    STRUCT(
      'pi_and_jailbreak' AS filter_type, 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.pi_and_jailbreak.piAndJailbreakFilterResult.matchState) AS match_state, 
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.pi_and_jailbreak.piAndJailbreakFilterResult.confidenceLevel), 'N/A') AS confidence_level
    ),
    STRUCT(
      'rai:hate_speech', 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.hate_speech.matchState), 
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.hate_speech.confidenceLevel), 'N/A')
    ),
    STRUCT(
      'rai:harassment', 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.harassment.matchState), 
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.harassment.confidenceLevel), 'N/A')
    ),
    STRUCT(
      'rai:sexually_explicit', 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.sexually_explicit.matchState), 
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.sexually_explicit.confidenceLevel), 'N/A')
    ),
    STRUCT(
      'rai:dangerous', 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.dangerous.matchState), 
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.dangerous.confidenceLevel), 'N/A')
    ),
    STRUCT(
      'csam', 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.csam.csamFilterFilterResult.matchState), 
      'N/A'
    ),
    STRUCT(
      'malicious_uris', 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.malicious_uris.maliciousUriFilterResult.matchState), 
      'N/A'
    ),
    STRUCT(
      'sdp (Sensitive Data)', 
      JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.sdp.sdpFilterResult.inspectResult.matchState), 
      'N/A'
    )
  ]) AS f
WHERE
  log.json_payload.operationType IS NOT NULL
  AND f.match_state = 'MATCH_FOUND'
GROUP BY
  1, 2
ORDER BY
  `Filter Type` ASC,          -- 👈 1. Sort alphabetically by filter name (groups identical categories like 'rai:' prefixes together)
  `Confidence Level` ASC      -- 👈 2. Within the same category, secondary-sort by confidence level (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)

-- ========================================================
-- ⚙️ MODEL ARMOR MONITORING TABLE - MAINTENANCE CONFIG
-- ========================================================
-- 1. Target Timezone: Modify 'Asia/Taipei' on line 11
-- 2. Target Project ID: Modify 'YOUR_GCP_PROJECT_ID' on line 55
-- ========================================================

WITH config AS (
  SELECT 'Asia/Taipei' AS tz   -- 👈 [1. Modify Timezone Here] (e.g., 'UTC', 'America/New_York')
)

SELECT
  -- 1. Log Time: Apply the timezone setting from the config CTE using a scalar subquery
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', log.timestamp, (SELECT tz FROM config)) AS log_time,
  
  -- 2. Sanitization Input: Automatically handles both plain text and Base64 decoded payloads
  COALESCE(
    JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationInput.text),
    SAFE_CONVERT_BYTES_TO_STRING(
      FROM_BASE64(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationInput.byteItem.byteData))
    ),
    '[Unable to parse input content]'
  ) AS sanitization_input,
  
  -- 3. Global Match Status: Indicates whether any filter rule caught a threat
  JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterMatchState) AS is_match,
  
  -- 4. Match Details: Dynamically extracts all matching threat categories (supports multi-filter matching)
  CASE 
    WHEN JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterMatchState) = 'NO_MATCH_FOUND' THEN 'None'
    ELSE COALESCE(
      -- 💡 Optimization: Use NULLIF and ARRAY_TO_STRING to string-join all matches while ignoring NULL values
      NULLIF(
        ARRAY_TO_STRING([
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.pi_and_jailbreak.piAndJailbreakFilterResult.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND',
             CONCAT('pi_and_jailbreak (', COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.pi_and_jailbreak.piAndJailbreakFilterResult.confidenceLevel), 'UNKNOWN'), ')'), NULL),
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.hate_speech.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND',
             CONCAT('rai:hate_speech (', COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.hate_speech.confidenceLevel), 'UNKNOWN'), ')'), NULL),
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.harassment.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND',
             CONCAT('rai:harassment (', COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.harassment.confidenceLevel), 'UNKNOWN'), ')'), NULL),
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.sexually_explicit.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND',
             CONCAT('rai:sexually_explicit (', COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.sexually_explicit.confidenceLevel), 'UNKNOWN'), ')'), NULL),
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.dangerous.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND',
             CONCAT('rai:dangerous (', COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.rai.raiFilterResult.raiFilterTypeResults.dangerous.confidenceLevel), 'UNKNOWN'), ')'), NULL),
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.csam.csamFilterFilterResult.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND', 'csam', NULL),
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.malicious_uris.maliciousUriFilterResult.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND', 'malicious_uris', NULL),
          IF(JSON_VALUE(log.json_payload.sanitizationResult.filterResults.sdp.sdpFilterResult.inspectResult.matchState) = 'MATCH_FOUND', 'sensitive_data_protection', NULL)
        ], ', '), 
        '' -- Converts empty string to standard NULL if no specific filters listed above matched
      ),
      'other_matched' -- Fallback catch-all if an unmapped custom filter rule triggers a match
    )
  END AS match_details

FROM
  -- 👈 [2. Modify Project ID Here] Must point to a strict, single Log View data path
  `YOUR_GCP_PROJECT_ID.global._Default._AllLogs` AS log
WHERE
  log.json_payload.operationType IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  log.timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1000
